allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if not k.startswith\('grid_'\) and k not in ['reviews','works']}\)")
Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./content/content.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({sing_up_link: c.sing_up_link, max_link: c.max_link, contacts: c.contacts}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const c = require\('./content/content.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(c\); keys.forEach\(k => { if\(k.includes\('max'\) || k.includes\('Max'\) || k.includes\('contact'\) || k.includes\('link'\) || k.includes\('social'\) || k.includes\('telegram'\) || k.includes\('messenger'\)\) console.log\(k+':', JSON.stringify\(c[k]\).slice\(0,100\)\) }\)")
